positive: A stylized, modern illustration featuring a vibrant bouquet of mixed wildflowers and lush tropical leaves, arranged in a central, circular composition. The artwork should have a bold, graphic silhouette style with thick outlines and clean color blocking, evoking a mid-century natural aesthetic. Color palette should be highly saturated yet harmonious, dominated by teal, coral pink, deep emerald green, and mustard yellow. The background should be solid, neutral cream or off-white to ensure maximum print contrast. The composition must be highly symmetrical and scalable, suitable for apparel or home decor print. Clean lines, vectorial quality, flat design.
negative: photorealistic, noise, blurry, low quality, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grunge, dirty
